title: Korean-Style Tofu Bites with Yeasty Breading
description: Crispy tofu bites coated in a yeasty, sweet, and spicy Korean-inspired breading, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Cut the tofu into bite-sized pieces.
In a small bowl, whisk together yeast, flour, Korean chili flakes, and rounded sugar.
Dip each tofu piece into the yeast mixture, coating evenly.
Dip the coated tofu pieces into the beaten egg.
Dip the egg-coated tofu pieces into the jeon mix, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Fry the coated tofu pieces until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain the fried tofu bites on paper towels.
